title: [spec-compliance] Hardcoded constants instead of lichen-core constants
description: rust/lichen-link/src/frame.rs and link_layer.rs hard-code MIC/SignaturePresent instead of using constants from lichen-core/src/constants.rs for L2_DISPATCH_SCHC=0x14, LICHEN_SIG_LEN=48 per draft-lichen-link-01.md. See project-LICHEN-s3t5
